evals.prompt: Pull the current text of Treas. Reg. §1.199A-5(b)(2)(xiv). What does it say about 'reputation or skill'?
evals.expected_output: Fetch eCFR Title 26 §1.199A-5(b)(2)(xiv). Quote ≤75 words. Treas. Reg. §1.199A-5(b)(2)(xiv) narrows the §199A(d)(2)(A) 'reputation or skill' SSTB category to three specific situations: endorsement income, licensing of an individual's likeness/name/voice, and appearance fees. Cite as TreasReg / regulation. Set chevron_replaced: true (interpretive narrowing of ambiguous statutory phrase 'reputation or skill'). TD 9847 (Feb. 2019) promulgated final QBI regulations including §1.199A-5; cite TD as TreasuryDecision / regulation when relying on preamble.

evals.prompt: Is Treas. Reg. §1.469-5T still in force? Pull current text of test 1 (>500 hours).
evals.expected_output: Fetch eCFR Title 26 §1.469-5T(a)(1). Confirm 'T' suffix indicates a temporary regulation; §7805(e) ordinarily limits temporary regs to 3 years. However, §1.469-5T was issued in 1988 and has remained in force as a temporary regulation due to congressional grandfathering for certain pre-1988 temporary regs (§7805(e)(1) applies to regs issued AFTER November 20, 1988). Quote test 1 verbatim: '(1) The individual participates in the activity for more than 500 hours during such year.' Cite as TreasReg / regulation. Set chevron_replaced: true (interpretive of §469(h)). Note Loper Bright posture; the seven tests have been broadly accepted by courts.

evals.prompt: There's a 2023 proposed reg under §174 (REG-XXXXXX-23). What's the authority weight if I rely on it for current-year tax position?
evals.expected_output: Identifies proposed regulation status. Proposed regs are published in the Federal Register but NOT codified in eCFR. They are not binding authority. Reliance under §1.6662-3(b)(3) reasonable-basis is possible if the proposed reg is substantively reasonable, but the IRS may issue final regs differing from the proposal. Recommendations: (1) Cite proposed reg as TreasReg / persuasive_non_authority (NOT regulation); (2) Note proposed status in narrative; (3) Consider Form 8275 disclosure if proposed reg is the closest authority for the position; (4) Watch Federal Register IRS feed for finalization. The actual REG number for §174 implementation guidance should be verified against the Federal Register IRS feed at https://www.federalregister.gov/agencies/internal-revenue-service before quoting authority.
expectations: Recommends Federal Register IRS feed for finalization
